name: gauge
title: Gauge
description: Read-only horizontal bar showing where a value sits inside a [min, max] range. Optional warning/critical threshold colors, leading label, units suffix, and numeric readout. Use for CPU, disk capacity, signal strength, queue depth.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct with New(theme.Default).WithMin(0).WithMax(100).WithValue(v). WithWidth sets the bar width in cells. WithLabel adds a leading label, WithUnits adds a trailing suffix on the readout. WithThresholds(warnFrac, critFrac) enables tiered coloring: values below warnFrac render in success color, between warnFrac and critFrac in warning, at or above critFrac in error. Set both to 0 to use Primary instead. WithReadout(false) suppresses the trailing number. WithFillRune and WithEmptyRune override the default glyphs. Percent() returns the clamped position in [0, 1] for downstream composition; Value() returns the raw input.
